title: Get started with
subtitle: Learn the platform step by step — pick your role and discover how to learn or teach effectively.

completion.title: You're all set!
completion.description: You now know the basics. Start your learning or teaching journey today.

student.intro: Get to know dashboard features — lessons, payments, wallet, complaints, rescheduling, and lesson reminders.

myLessons.title: My lessons
myLessons.description: View your weekly calendar, upcoming lessons, and the tutors you are learning with.

tips.tip1: The Calendar tab shows lessons by week — switch weeks or jump to Today.
tips.tip2: The Lessons tab lists upcoming and completed sessions.
tips.tip3: Tap Join class when it's time — opens your live room on Mezon.

pendingBookings.title: Pending payment
pendingBookings.description: Trial lessons or plans awaiting payment appear here — complete payment in time to keep your slot.

tips.tip1: Each item shows a countdown until payment expires.
tips.tip2: Tap Pay now to use the payment gateway or your wallet balance.
tips.tip3: After payment, the lesson moves to My lessons automatically.

wallet.title: Student wallet
wallet.description: Top up, check your balance, and review transaction history — pay for lessons faster.

tips.tip1: Your available balance is shown at the top of the Wallet page.
tips.tip2: Top up via the payment gateway — funds arrive right after success.
tips.tip3: Transactions log top-ups, lesson payments, and refunds.

complaints.title: Lesson complaints
complaints.description: If something went wrong in a lesson, submit a complaint from Dashboard for our team to review.

tips.tip1: Go to Complaints in the dashboard sidebar.
tips.tip2: Select the lesson and describe the issue in detail.
tips.tip3: Track resolution status — or use Contact support on this page if you need more help.

cancelAndSchedule.title: Reschedule & cancel lessons
cancelAndSchedule.description: Need a new time or want to cancel? Manage it from the Lessons tab under My lessons.

tips.tip1: Tap Reschedule/Cancel on an upcoming lesson to see your options.
tips.tip2: Rescheduling is only available more than 12 hours before the lesson — pick a new open slot.
tips.tip3: Cancelling a trial more than 12 hours ahead refunds to your wallet; within 12 hours there is no refund.

reminder.title: Lesson reminders
reminder.description: Ten minutes before a lesson starts, Mezonly sends you a reminder so you can get ready and join on time.

tips.tip1: Get a notification on the Mezonly website — your lesson starts in 10 minutes, please get ready.
tips.tip2: Google Calendar and Mezon app reminders include a voice room link — tap to join class right away.
tips.tip3: Check your device and connection before the reminder so you do not miss the lesson.

tutor.intro: Set up your Mezon Clan and learn about lesson reminders — follow the steps below.

createClan.title: Create your Clan on Mezon
createClan.description: Open Mezon and create a new Clan — this will be your official teaching space on the platform.
createClan.imageAlt: Illustration of creating a new Clan on Mezon

tips.tip1: Open Mezon and click the Create Clan button in the left sidebar.
tips.tip2: Pick a template you like or skip this step (we suggest the Study Group template).
tips.tip3: Enter your Clan name and upload a Clan avatar (avatar is optional).

voiceChannels.title: Create teaching voice channels
voiceChannels.description: Create voice channels in your Clan for live lessons — or use channels Mezon already set up if you picked a template.
voiceChannels.imageAlt: Illustration of creating voice channels in a Clan

tips.tip1: Click the <plus>+</plus> icon above the channel categories to create a new channel.
tips.tip2: Select Voice type, then enter the channel name.
tips.tip3: If you chose a template when creating your Clan, Mezon may have already created some channels (the image shows the Study Group template).

inviteBot.title: Invite Mezonly bot to your Clan
inviteBot.description: Use the official bot invite link to add Mezonly Bot to your Clan — required before running the setup command.
inviteBot.imageAlt: Illustration of inviting Mezonly Bot to a Clan

tips.tip1: Use <link>this link</link>, open it in a browser where you are logged into Mezon, select your Clan, and invite the bot.
tips.tip2: When you see a welcome message like the one shown, the bot was invited successfully.
tips.tip3: Check whether the bot is online as shown — if you cannot invite the bot or it is offline, please contact support.

setupCommand.title: Run the Mezonly setup command
setupCommand.description: In any text channel, run the setup command so the bot links your Clan to your tutor account on Mezonly.
setupCommand.imageAlt: Illustration of typing /setup mezonly in chat

tips.tip1: Open a text channel (e.g. #general) in your Clan.
tips.tip3: Follow the bot's reply — linking usually takes just a few seconds.

reminder.title: Lesson reminders
reminder.description: Ten minutes before a lesson starts, Mezonly notifies you and your student so you can both get ready.

tips.tip1: Get a notification on the Mezonly website — your lesson starts in 10 minutes, please get ready.
tips.tip2: Google Calendar and Mezon app reminders include a voice room link — tap to open your teaching room.
tips.tip3: Check your Clan and voice channel before the reminder so the lesson starts on time.

utilities.intro: Mezonly Bot commands and Channel Apps — join voice rooms faster and open Mezonly pages right inside your Clan.

botCommands.title: Mezonly Bot commands
botCommands.description: Use bot commands in your Clan to get an available voice channel — no need to hunt for a channel yourself.

tips.tip1: Open a text channel (e.g. #general) in a Clan that already has Mezonly Bot.
tips.tip3: The bot replies with a voice channel in your Clan — tap to join right away and save time.

channelApps.title: Mezonly Channel Apps
channelApps.description: Invite Channel Apps into your Clan to open Mezonly pages inside Mezon — no need to open the website and navigate manually.

tips.tip1: Each Channel App is a Mezonly page embedded in your Clan — invite the app, then open it from the sidebar.
tips.tip2: Invite <homeLink>Home page</homeLink> — Mezonly home inside your Clan.
tips.tip3: Invite <walletLink>Wallet</walletLink> — view and top up your wallet in Mezon.
tips.tip4: Invite <myLessonsLink>My lesson</myLessonsLink> — manage lessons as a student.
tips.tip5: Invite <myScheduleLink>My schedule</myScheduleLink> — view your teaching schedule as a tutor.
